glosses.en: job interview; interview for a position
glosses.it: colloquio di lavoro; colloquio di assunzione
glosses.yue: 求職面試; 工作面試
glosses.ru: собеседование; собеседование при приеме на работу
glosses.pt: entrevista de emprego; entrevista de trabalho
glosses.vi: phỏng vấn xin việc; phỏng vấn tuyển dụng
glosses.hi: नौकरी का साक्षात्कार; नौकरी का इंटरव्यू
glosses.ro: interviu de angajare; interviu pentru angajare
glosses.ja: 就職面接; 採用面接

translations.en: I have a job interview tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana tengo una entrevista de trabajo.
translations.it: Domani ho un colloquio di lavoro.
translations.pt: Amanhã tenho uma entrevista de emprego.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi có buổi phỏng vấn.
translations.sv: Jag har en anställningsintervju i morgon.
translations.ro: Mâine am un interviu de angajare.
translations.da: Jeg har en jobsamtale i morgen.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb (present, 1st sg) expressing possession.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the event.
Indefinite article (accusative singular neuter) modifying the noun.
Concrete noun (accusative singular); direct object of 'habe'.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder geht nervös ins Vorstellungsgespräch.

translations.de: Mein Bruder geht nervös ins Vorstellungsgespräch.
translations.en: My brother is nervous about the interview.
translations.es: Mi hermano está nervioso por la entrevista.
translations.fr: Mon frère est nerveux pour l’entretien.
translations.it: Mio fratello è nervoso per il colloquio.
translations.yue: 我阿哥對個面試好緊張。
translations.pt: Meu irmão está nervoso por causa da entrevista.
translations.tr: Erkek kardeşim iş görüşmesi yüzünden gergin.
translations.vi: Em trai tôi đang lo lắng về buổi phỏng vấn.
translations.nl: Mijn broer is nerveus voor het gesprek.
translations.hu: A bátyám ideges az állásinterjú miatt.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई इंटरव्यू को लेकर घबराया हुआ है.
translations.pl: Mój brat denerwuje się przed rozmową.
translations.el: Ο αδερφός μου είναι αγχωμένος για τη συνέντευξη.
translations.nb: Broren min er nervøs for intervjuet.
translations.id: Adik laki-laki saya gugup soal wawancara.
translations.sv: Min bror är nervös inför intervjun.
translations.ro: Fratele meu este nervos din cauza interviului.
translations.cs: Můj bratr je nervózní kvůli pohovoru.
translations.da: Min bror er nervøs for samtalen.
translations.ja: 弟は面接に緊張しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (nominative singular) modifying 'Bruder'.
Common noun (nominative singular masculine); subject of the clause.
Finite verb (present, 3rd sg) indicating motion.
Adjective used adverbially as a manner modifier of 'geht'.
Preposition contracted with article ('in das'); marks motion into a destination and governs accusative.
Noun (accusative singular) as object of the preposition 'ins'.

sentences.target: Nach dem Vorstellungsgespräch rufe ich dich an.
sentences.reading: /naːx deːm ˈfoːɐ̯ʃtɛlʊŋsɡəˌʃpʁɛːç ˈʁuːfə ɪç dɪç an/

translations.de: Nach dem Vorstellungsgespräch rufe ich dich an.
translations.ipa: /naːx deːm ˈfoːɐ̯ʃtɛlʊŋsɡəˌʃpʁɛːç ˈʁuːfə ɪç dɪç an/
translations.en: After the interview, I’ll call you.
translations.es: Después de la entrevista te llamo.
translations.zh-Hans: 面试结束后我给你打电话。
translations.pt: Depois da entrevista, eu te ligo.
translations.vi: Sau buổi phỏng vấn tôi sẽ gọi cho bạn.
translations.nl: Na het gesprek bel ik je.
translations.hi: इंटरव्यू के बाद मैं तुम्हें फोन करूंगा.
translations.el: Μετά τη συνέντευξη θα σε πάρω τηλέφωνο.
translations.id: Setelah wawancara saya akan menelepon kamu.
translations.da: Efter samtalen ringer jeg til dig.
translations.ja: 面接が終わったら電話するね。

tokens.explanation: Preposition meaning 'after'; governs dative.
Definite article (dative singular neuter) within the PP headed by 'Nach'.
Noun (dative singular) as object of the preposition 'Nach'.
Finite verb (present, 1st sg) from separable verb 'anrufen'; part of a split verb complex.
Personal pronoun (1st person singular nominative); subject of 'rufe'.
Personal pronoun (2nd person singular accusative); direct object of 'rufe'.
Separable verbal particle completing 'anrufen'; clause-final position in main clause.

sentences.target: Sie wartet draußen auf ihr Vorstellungsgespräch.

translations.de: Sie wartet draußen auf ihr Vorstellungsgespräch.
translations.en: She waits outside for her interview.
translations.es: Ella está esperando afuera para la entrevista.
translations.fr: Elle attend dehors pour son entretien.
translations.it: Sta aspettando fuori per il colloquio.
translations.pt: Ela está esperando do lado de fora para a entrevista.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang đợi bên ngoài để phỏng vấn.
translations.ar: هي تنتظر في الخارج من أجل مقابلتها.
translations.nl: Ze wacht buiten op haar gesprek.
translations.uk: Вона чекає зовні на свою співбесіду.
translations.hi: वह अपने इंटरव्यू के लिए बाहर इंतज़ार कर रही है.
translations.pl: Ona czeka na zewnątrz na rozmowę.
translations.el: Περιμένει έξω για τη συνέντευξή της.
translations.nb: Hun venter utenfor på intervjuet sitt.
translations.id: Dia menunggu di luar untuk wawancaranya.
translations.sv: Hon väntar utanför inför sin intervju.
translations.ro: Ea așteaptă afară pentru interviul ei.
translations.da: Hun venter udenfor på sin samtale.
translations.ja: 彼女は外で面接を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (3rd person singular nominative, feminine); subject.
Finite verb (present, 3rd sg) indicating the action of waiting.
Adverb of place specifying location.
Preposition; with 'warten auf' it selects accusative for the object being awaited.
Possessive determiner (accusative singular neuter, attributive use) modifying the noun.
Noun (accusative singular) as the object of the preposition 'auf'.
